name: Japanese Eggplant with Sesame-Ginger Glaze
recipeIngredient: 8 small Japanese eggplant, 4 oz each, halved lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together vinegar, soy sauce, hoisin sauce (if using), sesame oil, sugar, ginger, and garlic in a small bowl.
2. Brush the oil over all surfaces of the eggplant and sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Prepare the barbecue grill on medium heat.
4. Place the eggplant, cut side down, on the grill and let cook for 5 minutes.
5. Turn the eggplant and brush with glaze; continue cooking until the eggplant is very soft.
6. Transfer the eggplant to a serving platter and drizzle with more glaze.
7. Sprinkle with minced scallions and serve.
